info.title: AzureDiskSnapshotTool
info.description: CLI tool that creates Azure managed disk snapshots.

commands.name: create
commands.description: Creates a snapshot of the specified managed disk.

options.name: --diskName
options.description: Name of the managed disk from which to take a snapshot.

options.name: --resourceGroup
options.description: Resource group in which the managed disk exists.

options.name: --snapshotName
options.description: Defines the name of the snapshot resource.

options.name: --subscriptionId
options.description: Subscription ID in which the managed disk exists.

options.name: --targetresourceGroup
options.description: Resource group in which the snapshot will be created.

options.name: --targetsubscriptionId
options.description: Subscription ID in which the the snapshot will be created.

options.name: --tenantId
options.description: Tenant ID against which to authenticate the current Azure credentials.

options.name: --retainLimit
options.description: Limits the retained snapshots to specified count.  Default is unlimited (0).

options.name: --skuType
options.description: Snapshot sku type.  Available values are 'Standard_LRS' or 'Premium_LRS'. Default is 'Standard_LRS'.

options.name: --tenantId
options.description:

options.name: --help
